  • DropDownstars2.2k - A Material Design drop down for iOS.
  • Elementstars858 - Programmatic UI framework for macOS.
  • Elissastars169 - Displays a notification on top of a UITabBarItem or any UIView anchor view to reveal additional information.
  • EstMusicIndicatorstars464 - Music play indicator like iTunes.
  • FAQViewstars466 - An easy to use FAQ view for iOS.
  • Fashionstars121 - Fashion accessories and beauty tools to share and reuse UI styles.
  • GRMustachestars562 - Flexible Mustache templates.
  • GrowingTextViewstars919 - UITextView that supports auto growing, placeholder and length limit.
  • HorizontalDialstars209 - A horizontal scroll dial like Instagram.
  • IGColorPickerstars268 - A customizable color picker for iOS.
  • InfoViewstars60 - Simple information view with pointed arrow.
  • KMNavigationBarTransitionstars3.3k - A drop-in universal library helps you to manage the navigation bar styles and makes transition animations smooth between different navigation bar styles while pushing or popping a view controller for all orientations.
  • LicensePliststars2.2k - A command-line tool that automatically generates a Plist of all your dependencies.
  • Macawstars5.9k - Powerful and easy-to-use vector graphics library with SVG support.
  • Magneticstars1.4k - SpriteKit Floating Bubble Picker (inspired by Apple Music).
  • Materialstars11.9k - Express your creativity with Material, an animation and graphics framework for Google's Material Design and Apple's Flat UI.
  • MPParallaxViewstars1.7k - Apple TV Parallax effect.
  • MXParallaxHeaderstars1.7k - Simple parallax header for UIScrollView.
  • MZFormSheetPresentationControllerstars978 - Provides an alternative to the native iOS UIModalPresentationFormSheet, adding support for iPhone and additional opportunities to setup controller size and feel form sheet.
  • PullToDismissstars479 - You can dismiss modal viewcontroller by pulling scrollview or navigationbar.
  • RangeSeekSliderstars631 - A customizable range slider like a UISlider for iOS.
  • SelectionDialogstars117 - Simple selection dialog.
  • SKPhotoBrowserstars2.4k - Simple PhotoBrowser/Viewer inspired by facebook, twitter photo browsers.
  • SpreadsheetViewstars34 - Full configurable spreadsheet view user interfaces for iOS applications.
  • StatefulViewControllerstars2.1k - Placeholder views based on content, loading, error or empty states.
  • Toasterstars1.6k - Notification toasts.
  • TouchVisualizerstars847 - Lightweight touch visualization library with a single line of code.
  • Twinklestars599 - Easy way to make elements in your iOS app twinkle.
  • YNSearchstars1.2k - Awesome fully customizable search view like Pinterest.

    • Libs

    Alert

  • Alertiftstars286 - Modern, easy UIAlertController wrapper.
  • CDAlertViewstars1.1k - Highly customizable alert/notification/success/error/alarm popup.
  • EZAlertControllerstars366 - Easy UIAlertController.
  • Kamagaristars77 - Simple UIAlertController builder class.
  • NotificationBannerstars4.5k - The easiest way to display highly customizable in app notification banners in iOS.
  • SwiftMessagesstars6.7k - A very flexible message bar for iOS.
  • SwiftyDropstars691 - Lightweight dropdown message bar.
  • XLActionControllerstars3.3k - Fully customizable and extensible action sheet controller.

  • DOFavoriteButtonstars3.6k - Cute Animated Button.
  • Floatystars1.5k - Floating Action Button for iOS.
  • NFDownloadButtonstars432 - Revamped Download Button. It's kinda a reverse engineering of Netflix's app download button.
  • SwiftShareBubblesstars175 - Animated social share buttons control for iOS.

  • Drag and Drop UICollectionViewstars497 - Dragging and Dropping data across multiple UICollectionViews.
